module simd_i32x4_dot_i16x8.0.wasm
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:01000100010001000100010001000100 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:01000100010001000100010001000100 v128:01000100010001000100010001000100 -> v128:02000000020000000200000002000000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:01000100010001000100010001000100 v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:fefffffffefffffffefffffffeffffff
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:02000000020000000200000002000000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ff3fff3fff3fff3fff3fff3fff3fff3f v128:00400040004000400040004000400040 -> v128:0080ff1f0080ff1f0080ff1f0080ff1f
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00400040004000400040004000400040 v128:00400040004000400040004000400040 -> v128:00000020000000200000002000000020
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:01c001c001c001c001c001c001c001c0 v128:00c000c000c000c000c000c000c000c0 -> v128:0080ff1f0080ff1f0080ff1f0080ff1f
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00c000c000c000c000c000c000c000c0 v128:00c000c000c000c000c000c000c000c0 -> v128:00000020000000200000002000000020
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ffbfffbfffbfffbfffbfffbfffbfffbf v128:00c000c000c000c000c000c000c000c0 -> v128:00800020008000200080002000800020
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:fd7ffd7ffd7ffd7ffd7ffd7ffd7ffd7f v128:01000100010001000100010001000100 -> v128:faff0000faff0000faff0000faff0000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:fe7ffe7ffe7ffe7ffe7ffe7ffe7ffe7f v128:01000100010001000100010001000100 -> v128:fcff0000fcff0000fcff0000fcff0000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00800080008000800080008000800080 v128:01000100010001000100010001000100 -> v128:0000ffff0000ffff0000ffff0000ffff
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:02800280028002800280028002800280 v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:fcff0000fcff0000fcff0000fcff0000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:01800180018001800180018001800180 v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:feff0000feff0000feff0000feff0000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00800080008000800080008000800080 v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:00000100000001000000010000000100
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7f v128:ff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7f -> v128:0200fe7f0200fe7f0200fe7f0200fe7f
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00800080008000800080008000800080 v128:00800080008000800080008000800080 -> v128:00000080000000800000008000000080
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:00800080008000800080008000800080 v128:01800180018001800180018001800180 -> v128:0000ff7f0000ff7f0000ff7f0000ff7f
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:01000100010001000100010001000100 -> v128:fefffffffefffffffefffffffeffffff
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:02000000020000000200000002000000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7fff7f -> v128:0200ffff0200ffff0200ffff0200ffff
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:00800080008000800080008000800080 -> v128:00000100000001000000010000000100
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:02000000020000000200000002000000
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:0080ffff0080ffff0080ffff0080ffff v128:01800000018000000180000001800000 -> v128:0080ff3f0080ff3f0080ff3f0080ff3f
assert_return i32x4.dot_i16x8_s v128:6f00de004d01bc012b029a0209037803 v128:5704ae08050d5c11b3150a1a611eb822 -> v128:9d680900110b2f0015c97200a9a2d400
assert_invalid simd_i32x4_dot_i16x8.1.wasm
assert_invalid simd_i32x4_dot_i16x8.2.wasm
assert_invalid simd_i32x4_dot_i16x8.3.wasm
